business.type_label: rural guesthouse / auto-camp / day-use BBQ & river-play venue
business.geography_hint: Akikawa valley, Akiruno / Okutama, Tokyo, Japan

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor decides by browsing photos, room types, rates, access/directions and hours of a physical lodging/BBQ destination — checking the PLACE is the decision. No defined expertise sold and no work-portfolio-as-proof.

goal.one_action: book a stay / day-use BBQ (or phone/email to inquire) for the venue
goal.delegated_to: reserva / asoview / jalan (external booking platforms), plus tel/email

structure.archetype_note: Classic multi-page destination/lodging site: home + per-offer pages (rooms, day-use, camp, cafe, activities) + access/directions + FAQ, each carrying a gallery and Facebook embed.

mapped.observed_as: 瀬音の湯至近！！奥多摩の秋川渓谷スタイルを味わえる宿
お問い合わせ (phone/email contact block)
About us / OtsuNatureGardenと周辺の紹介
客室『川の音』/ 日帰りBBQ,川遊び (room types & day-use offers)
◇料金◇ seasonal per-person rates, parking, river-play fees
アクセス/access/方向 (directions by train/bus/bike/taxi)

unmapped.observed: 低炭素交通 (low-carbon transport ranking / eco-transport encouragement)
unmapped.why_no_fit: A values/sustainability advisory block ranking transport modes by environmental impact — not persuasion of the offer, an ethos statement tied to their eco-lodge membership

unmapped.observed: Tattoo policy / cash-only / auto-camp suspended notices
unmapped.why_no_fit: Operational policy & availability notices; partly FAQ, partly announcement — not a persuasion section

proposed_new.name: external-booking-redirect
proposed_new.evidence: All reservation CTAs (RESERVA予約, アソビュー体験, じゃらん体験) hand off to third-party appointment/booking engines; no on-site scheduling or checkout.

confidence.why: fetch_quality full; multi-page structure, CTAs, pricing, proof and embeds all captured. Minor gap: new-villa room page and cafe/camp/activities pages not crawled in depth, but the archetype is unambiguous.

gap_findings: The low-carbon transport ranking block is an ethos/values section with no canonical home — an eco/sustainability statement tied to the venue's ecolodge-association membership.

Booking is fully delegated to multiple external platforms (RESERVA/Asoview/Jalan) — captured only via the proposed external-booking-redirect capability; the closed vocab cannot express multi-platform off-site booking handoff.
